name: GOV.UK — Finance and support for your business
note: Government's own directory of live grants/loans; text-only, no JS required, updated centrally.

name: Innovate UK Business Connect — Opportunities
note: Curated Innovate UK / UKRI / Horizon Europe calls.

name: Innovation Funding Service — competition search
note: Official Innovate UK competition listing, server-rendered.

name: RNID — Apply for research funding
note: Hearing-loss specific research grants; directly relevant to TactiCall.

name: Royal Academy of Engineering — Enterprise Fellowships
FundsforNGOs — funding for individuals
note: Aggregator; noisy but broad coverage, good for surfacing leads to verify.

name: King's Trust — Enterprise programme
note: Rolling small grants for 18-30 founders; low priority but cheap to check.

name: Brave Search — 通用资助/加速器搜索
query: assistive technology deaf hard of hearing startup grant UK accelerator
note: Search-engine safety net so leads aren't limited to the curated list above. Plain fetch() scraping of Google/Bing/DuckDuckGo's result HTML was tested and reliably blocked by bot-detection (CAPTCHA / "anomaly" pages) even with a normal browser User-Agent, so this uses the Brave Search API instead — needs a free BRAVE_API_KEY repo secret (see README); without it this source is skipped gracefully rather than breaking the crawl.

name: Brave Search — LinkedIn 站内搜索 (grant/accelerator 帖子)
query: site:linkedin.com deaf hard of hearing assistive technology startup grant accelerator funding
note: LinkedIn blocks unauthenticated scraping outright (fetching linkedin.com directly just hits a login wall), so this proxies a site:linkedin.com query through the Brave Search API instead — same BRAVE_API_KEY requirement as the source above.

name: Claude 网络调研 (语义理解搜索)
note: 所有别的来源都是靠 data/keywords.json 里的词做逐字匹配——这也是 UnLtd、RAEng 这些页面明明相关却被漏掉的原因（措辞没撞上关键词表）。这条改成调用 Anthropic API 的 web_search 工具，让模型自己去搜、自己判断相关性，而不是字面比对。需要一个 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 仓库 secret（这是按量计费的付费 API，和 Claude Code 订阅是分开算钱的，每次运行搜索次数有上限，实际花费很小但不是免费的，见 README）；没配置这个 secret 时这条来源会被跳过，不影响其他来源。
